name: N8n Workflow
description: Natural-language n8n workflow actions (create, activate, deactivate, delete). Eliza auto-resolves N8N_HOST and N8N_API_KEY by minting a short-lived token from the Eliza Cloud n8n gateway when paired (the cloud key itself is never passed through), or by booting the local n8n sidecar otherwise. Explicit env/config values override both.

N8N_HOST.label: N8n Host
N8N_HOST.help: n8n instance URL. Leave blank — Eliza auto-resolves this via the Eliza Cloud n8n gateway when cloud is authenticated, or via the local n8n sidecar when it is running.

N8N_API_KEY.label: N8n Api Key
N8N_API_KEY.help: n8n API key. Leave blank — Eliza auto-resolves this (cloud gateway token or sidecar token). Only set this to override the auto-resolved credential.
